- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/refactoring (no functional changes)

- [ ] 🔒 Security enhancement

- [ ] 🚀 CI/CD improvement

## 🔍 Review Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] 📏 Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] 🏗️ Architecture is consistent with project patterns
- [ ] 🧹 No code duplication
- [ ] 💡 Code is well-commented and self-documenting
- [ ] 🔍 No obvious bugs or logic errors
- [ ] 🎯 Single responsibility principle followed

### API Changes
<!-- If API changes were made -->
- [ ] 🔄 Backward compatibility maintained
- [ ] 📋 OpenAPI schema updated
- [ ] 📝 API documentation updated
- [ ] 🧪 API tests added/updated
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking changes documented

### Configuration

- [ ] 📄 Default values are sensible
- [ ] 🔒 Sensitive values use environment variables
- [ ] 📖 Configuration is documented

## 📋 Pre-Merge Checklist

### Before Requesting Review
- [ ] 🔄 Code is rebased on latest main branch
- [ ] ✅ All tests are passing
- [ ] 📏 Linting passes
- [ ] 🔍 Self-review completed
- [ ] 📚 Documentation updated
- [ ] 🧪 Manual testing completed

### Before Merging
- [ ] ✅ All CI checks are passing
- [ ] 👀 Code review completed and approved
- [ ] 🔒 Security review completed (if needed)
- [ ] 📊 Performance review completed (if needed)
- [ ] 📋 QA testing completed (if needed)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation review completed
